relations: Origami uses mathematical principles and theories for paper folding
Geometry is applied in origami to calculate exact angles and lengths of folds
Symmetry is utilized in origami to enhance the beauty and stability of creations
Origami principles are applied in engineering to create innovative structures
Origami principles are used in architecture for designing efficient structures
Origami concepts are applied in material science for new materials and designs
Origami mathematics contributes to computational origami in computer science
Geometry is a branch of mathematics that is fundamental to origami
Symmetry, a mathematical concept, is crucial in the design of origami
